purpose: Card copy strings used by both iOS and Android native renderers. Copy is shared so the two platforms produce identical printable cards.

protocol.title: Safewords Protocol
protocol.subtitle: Ask. Listen. Hang up if it's wrong.
rules: Do not say the word first.
If they cannot answer, hang up.
Call back on a number you already know.

staticOverride.title: Safewords Override
staticOverride.subtitle: {groupName} — emergency override word
staticOverride.warningHeading: Anyone with this card can verify as {groupName}.
staticOverride.warningBody: Treat it like a key. Don't photograph. Don't share over the phone. Replace by rotating the group seed if it's compromised.
staticOverride.footer: Override is fixed for this group seed. Rotate the seed to change it.

challengeAnswerWallet.title: Challenge / Answer — {groupName}
challengeAnswerWallet.subtitle: First 24 rows. Both phones see the same table.
challengeAnswerWallet.warningHeading: Anyone with this card can verify as {groupName}.
challengeAnswerWallet.warningBody: Keep it folded in a wallet, not photographed. Replace by rotating the group seed if it's compromised.

challengeAnswerProtocol.title: Challenge / Answer — {groupName}
challengeAnswerProtocol.subtitle: Full 100-row table. Both phones see the same table.
challengeAnswerProtocol.warningHeading: Anyone with this card can verify as {groupName}.
challengeAnswerProtocol.warningBody: Store this folded. Don't post on a fridge. Replace by rotating the group seed if it's compromised.

recoveryPhrase.title: Safewords Recovery — {groupName}
recoveryPhrase.subtitle: 24-word BIP39 recovery phrase
recoveryPhrase.warningHeading: Anyone with this phrase can restore {groupName}.
recoveryPhrase.warningBody: Don't photograph. Don't store in cloud notes or email. Treat it like a wallet seed phrase.
recoveryPhrase.footer: Re-enter on Safewords (iOS or Android) to restore.

groupInvite.title: Join {groupName}
groupInvite.subtitle: Scan to join the group on your phone.
groupInvite.warningHeading: Anyone who scans this QR joins {groupName} as a full member.
groupInvite.warningBody: Until expiring invites exist, this QR is seed-equivalent. Hand to one person, then destroy.
groupInvite.footer: Scan in the Safewords app: Onboarding -> Join with QR
